description_long: This is a dark brown glass wine bottle with a slender, elongated neck and a gently sloping shoulder. The bottle features a large, rectangular label on its front, displaying an image of grape clusters and some text, suggesting a red wine variety. The label is predominantly white and green with purple grapes, and it wraps partially around the bottle. The bottle's surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of glass, and there are no visible seams or embellishments apart from the label. The closure at the top is not clearly detailed, but the neck is narrow and cylindrical. The base of the bottle is not visible, so the punt design cannot be determined.
description: A dark brown glass wine bottle with a grape-themed label and a slender neck, featuring a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full label with grape imagery and text, highlighting the bottle's main branding.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the label partially wrapping around the bottle and the bottle's smooth, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible label or markings, showing the plain dark brown glass surface.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the edge of the label and the bottle's slender profile.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large, rectangular label on the front of the bottle, featuring an image of purple grape clusters with green leaves, and some small white text. The label is mostly white with colored imagery and is centered vertically on the bottle's body.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, and cylindrical neck with a gentle taper toward the top and a slight bulge at the transition to the bottle body.
